title: Professional Cleaning & Facility Management Services in KSA
badge: Trusted Facility Management in Saudi Arabia
description: Purity for Maintenance and Cleaning (PMC) delivers comprehensive facility management, manpower supply, cleaning, and maintenance services across Jeddah and the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

about.title: Your Trusted Partner for Facility Excellence in Saudi Arabia
paragraphs: Purity for Maintenance and Cleaning Co. (PMC) is a fully licensed Saudi facility management company headquartered in Jeddah.
Our team of skilled professionals delivers reliable, high-quality services tailored to the unique demands of the Saudi market.

principles.title: Vision
principles.description: To be the leading integrated facility management company in Saudi Arabia, recognized for quality, reliability, and innovation.

principles.title: Mission
principles.description: Delivering exceptional cleaning and maintenance services that enhance living and working environments across KSA.

principles.title: Values
principles.description: Integrity, professionalism, customer satisfaction, and environmental responsibility guide everything we do.

principles.title: Experience
principles.description: Over 10 years operating in the Saudi market with deep knowledge of local regulations and client expectations.

services.title: Manpower Supply
services.description: Skilled and semi-skilled workforce for all your operational needs across KSA.

services.title: Cleaning Services
services.description: Professional cleaning solutions for commercial, industrial, and residential properties.

services.title: Building Maintenance
services.description: Comprehensive maintenance programs to keep your facilities in prime condition.

services.title: Facility Management
services.description: End-to-end facility management ensuring smooth operations 24/7.

services.title: Glass & Facade Cleaning
services.description: Specialized high-rise and facade cleaning using modern equipment and techniques.

services.title: Pest Control
services.description: Safe and effective pest management services for all types of premises.

services.title: Deep Cleaning
services.description: Thorough deep cleaning services to restore hygiene to the highest standards.

services.title: AC Maintenance
services.description: Air conditioning maintenance, repair, and installation for all systems.

services.title: MEP Services
services.description: Mechanical, electrical, and plumbing services by certified engineers.

contact.address: Gate B, Suite 404B, Bin Hamran Center, Jeddah, KSA
